title: 09286_Foundation_Model_Insights_and_a_Multi-Model_Approach_for_Superior_Fine-Grained_One-shot_Subset_Selection
positive_examples: Improves data efficiency in machine learning by leveraging multiple foundation models for one-shot subset selection
Lowers barriers to deploying high-performing models in low-resource or underrepresented domains
negative_examples: Careful consideration is needed to avoid reinforcing dataset biases
